Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigShoppingFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.AutoListSearch:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.DefaultListHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AutoListSearch, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.DefaultShoppingList:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DefaultListHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ListMissingTerms:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DefaultShoppingList, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_TEXT; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_AUTO_LIST_SEARCH; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_AUTO_LIST_SEARCH_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_AUTO_LIST_SEARCH_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_LIST_MISSING_TERMS; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_LIST_MISSING_TERMS_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_LIST_MISSING_TERMS_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
